title: Daoist Canon: Liezi (Zhang Zhan commentary) (Section 7)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Liezi (Zhang Zhan commentary)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Liezi (Zhang Zhan commentary)

translation.text: From the Liezi (Zhang Zhan commentary) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
